payload.answer: Unable to extract article takeaways because the fetch failed with a 404 network error.
payload.decision: Do not commit the article’s substantive content to memory because the fetch failed; only retain the retrieval failure/context as a low-confidence operational note.

entity_resolution.reason: No durable source entity or article content could be verified from the failed fetch.

payload.intent: Extract a durable takeaway from the provided source context without inventing article content.

memory_cards.statement: A requested article at https://example.com/missing could not be fetched; the mock fetch result was a 404 network error.

details: Source fetch failed with 404 network error
No article claims were inferred or stored

repair_options: Provide the article text or a working archive link
Store only the access failure as metadata if needed
